name: Georgia Peach Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the peaches.
2. In a large bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon. Stir in brown sugar.
3. Cut in margarine with a pastry blender until crumbly. Add pecans and mix well.
4. Beat egg slightly with milk; stir into the flour mixture until blended.
5. Spread dough evenly on two greased 9-inch pans, about 1/2 inch from the edges.
6. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Sweeten peaches to taste with sugar.
8. Flavor whipped cream with almond flavoring.
9. Place one shortcake layer on a serving plate.
10. Top with sliced peaches and whipped cream.
11. Add the remaining shortcake layer.
12. Spoon remaining peaches and whipped cream over the top layer.
13. Serve immediately.
